task_name: Add Custom Theme System to T3 Code Editor

plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's a summary of the plan I've created:

## Custom Theme System — Plan Summary

**7 files to touch** across 2 packages:

### New files (2)
- **`packages/shared/src/themes.ts`** — Pure TypeScript module with the `Theme` interface, `ThemeColors` interface, 3 built-in presets (`t3-dark`, `t3-light`, `t3-midnight`) with explicit hex colors, and `getTheme(id)` / `listThemes()` exports
- **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — Accessible radio-group of theme cards, each with a 3-dot color swatch (background, foreground, sidebar colors)

### Modified files (5)
- **`packages/shared/package.json`** — Add `"./themes"` subpath export (matching the existing `"./model"`, `"./git"` pattern)
- **`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Complete rewrite: now returns `{ theme: Theme, setTheme, availableThemes, resolvedTheme }`. Applies colors via `style.setProperty()`, migrates old `"dark"/"light"/"system"` localStorage values, exports a thin `ThemeProvider` component. `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` preserved for backward compat with `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`
- **`apps/web/src/index.css`** — Add `--t3-sidebar`, `--t3-editor`, `--t3-terminal`, `--t3-status-bar`, `--t3-font-family` CSS var defaults to `:root`; update `body` font-family to `var(--t3-font-family)`
- **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Replace the existing 3-option radio buttons with `<ThemeSelector />`, remove `THEME_OPTIONS`
- **`apps/web/src/router.ts`** — Wrap the provider chain with `ThemeProvider` (between `QueryClientProvider` and `StoreProvider`)
